phone.heading: Phone Number
phone.description: Choose a phone number for your AI receptionist.

ilNotice.title: Israeli numbers — Twilio regulatory requirement
ilNotice.body: To activate a +972 phone number, Twilio requires regulatory documents from the Israeli Ministry of Communications (משרד התקשורת):
ilNotice.business: Business: Company registration (ח.פ. / ע.מ.) + proof of address
ilNotice.contact: After selecting a number below, contact us at support@boltcall.org and we will guide you through submitting your bundle to Twilio.
ilNotice.alternative: Alternative: Forward your existing Cellcom/Partner/Bezeq number to your Boltcall number using call forwarding — no regulatory documents needed.

knowledge.heading: Knowledge Base
knowledge.description: Add your services, FAQs, and business documents so your AI agent can answer callers accurately.

survey.heading: One Last Thing
survey.description: Help us personalize your AI agent.
